kalshiQuestion: Will Victor Wembanyama record the most total points in the New York vs San Antonio Pro Basketball Finals series in the 2026 Pro Basketball Playoffs?

call.aiReasoning: Wembanyama’s scoring is elite, but he trails Jalen Brunson by a wide margin in total points (331 to 265) heading into the Finals. While he can close the gap, the odds favor Brunson maintaining his lead given his consistency and head start. The market’s 41% price seems slightly optimistic for a Wembanyama comeback.
